  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Names the load-bearing concept (commitment) and shows where the draft drifts from it (lower commitment in CMDP under operational rolling re-planning), proposing a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (e.g., the learned multiplier cannot adapt to the disjoint constraint landscape of 4-hour windows), proposing minimal repairs.",
    "R1.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure (cost, QoS, and commitment across strategies and markets).",
    "R1.6": "Improves a few problem paragraphs for clarity and flow.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., computational cost does not explain the performance differences).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the claim about computational cost is potentially misleading).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
